mapper.select: SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CHAT_CONTENT, TBC.CHAT_CREATE_AT, TBC.CHAT_TYPE, TBC.USER_ID, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_PROFILE, CASE WHEN TBC.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CHAT_IS_ME FROM TBL_CHAT TBC JOIN TBL_USER TBU ON TBC.USER_ID = TBU.ID JOIN TBL_CHAT_ROOM TCR ON TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID = TCR.ID WHERE TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID = #{chatRoomId} AND TCR.CHAT_ROOM_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TBC.ID DESC

SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CHAT_CONTENT, TBC.CHAT_CREATE_AT, TBC.CHAT_TYPE, TBC.USER_ID, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_PROFILE FROM TBL_CHAT TBC JOIN TBL_USER TBU ON TBC.USER_ID = TBU.ID JOIN TBL_CHAT_ROOM TCR ON TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID = TCR.ID WHERE TBC.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CHAT (ID, CHAT_CONTENT, CHAT_TYPE, USER_ID, CHAT_ROOM_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{chatContent}, #{chatType}, #{userId}, #{chatRoomId})
